---
title: "Model 1"
subtitle: "Tarea 4 - 5"
author:
  - name: "Rigoberto J. Martinez Madriz"
    affiliations:
      - name: "ITESO"
      - name: "Quantitative Finance"
  - name: "Kaysi Fuentes Piña"
    affiliations:
      - name: "ITESO"
      - name: "Quantitative Finance"
date: "2025-02-17"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "Contenido"
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contenido"
number-sections: true
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

from scipy import stats
import yfinance as yf

from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os
import sys
```

```{python}
pd.options.display.float_format = '{:,.2f}'.format
```

```{python}
load_dotenv()  # carga .env
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.environ["CUANTIS_ROOT"], "src"))
```

```{python}
# CVX
tickets = ["CVX"]

start_date = "2016-02-11"
end_date = "2026-02-17"
```

```{python}
prices = yf.download(tickets, start_date, end_date)["Close"]
prices.head(3)
```

```{python}
returns = prices.pct_change().dropna()
returns["r"] = np.log(prices["CVX"]) - np.log(prices["CVX"].shift(1))
returns.columns = ["R", "r"]
returns.head(3)
```

```{python}
S0 = prices["CVX"].iloc[-1]
S0

mu_R = returns["R"].mean()
sigma_R = returns["R"].std()

T = 365
t = 0

S0
```


```{python}
muX = np.log(S0) + (mu_R - 0.5*sigma_R**2)*(T-t)

sigmaX = sigma_R*np.sqrt(T-t)
```

```{python}
sigmaX
```

```{python}
## Probabilidad P(S>40)
x_i = np.log(200)

z = (x_i- muX) / sigmaX
z
```

```{python}
Z = stats.norm(loc = 0, scale = 1)

P40 = Z.cdf(z)
P40
```

```{python}
np.exp(muX)
```

```{python}
np.exp(sigmaX)
```

```{python}
Z2 = stats.norm(loc = np.exp(muX), scale = np.exp(sigmaX))

P40 = Z2.cdf(x_i)
P40
```


```{python}
mu_R_annual = (1 + mu_R) ** 365 -1
sigma_R_annual = mu_R * np.sqrt(252)

T = 1
t = 0

muX_annual = np.log(S0) + mu_R_annual - (0.5*sigma_R_annual**2)*(T-t)

sigmaX_annual = sigma_R_annual*np.sqrt(T-t)

Z3 = stats.norm(loc = muX_annual, scale = sigmaX_annual)
P40 = Z3.cdf(np.log(x_i))
P40
```
